title: Christmas Barrels and Shulkers
description: On Christmas, chests get a special christmas texture. However, barrels and shulker boxes are left out. This pack gives them a christmas texture, based directly on the vanilla textures.
body: # Christmas Barrels and Shulkers [](https://modrinth.com/project/christmas-barrels-and-shulkers) [](https://discord.gg/VVTJhkKc4G) On Christmas, chests get a special christmas texture. However, barrels and shulker boxes are left out. I thought that this was quite silly, so I've gone ahead and created this texture pack, which them a christmas texture, based directly on the vanilla textures. The barrels look quite similar to the single chests, just simply recoloured to a similar red, and the same yellow ribbon. Shulker boxes on the other hand, are just the normal shulker box colour with that same ribbon design on them, with the colour adjusted to be roughly the opposite of the shulker's colour on the colour wheel... they're just like presents! This does not have the automatic texture switching that the chests have, so you will need to manually add and remove this texture pack like any other regular texture pack.
